changeSet.author: assistant
changeSet.sql: CREATE KEYSPACE IF NOT EXISTS distcomp WITH replication = {'class': 'SimpleStrategy', 'replication_factor': 1};

changeSet.author: assistant
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS distcomp.tbl_note ( tweet_id bigint, id bigint, country text, content text, state text, PRIMARY KEY ((tweet_id), id) );

changeSet.author: assistant
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE distcomp.tbl_note ADD state text;
